The latest announcement is out from Dashan Education Holdings Limited ( (HK:9986) ).

Dashan Education Holdings Limited announced the resignation of Mr. Zhang Hongjun from his roles as Executive Director and Chairman, among other positions, effective December 1, 2025. The resignation is due to Mr. Zhang’s desire to focus on other commitments, and there were no disagreements with the Board. The company is actively seeking to fill the resulting vacancies to maintain compliance with regulatory requirements. Additionally, trading of the company’s shares has been temporarily halted pending a clarification announcement regarding a restriction notice related to the company’s shares.

Agile Group Holdings Limited reported an aggregated pre-sold value of approximately RMB0.64 billion for November 2025, with a gross floor area of about 70,000 sq.m. and an average selling price of RMB9,083 per sq.m.
